findings.description: Header graphics and logos are missing from the HTML.
findings.evidence: On page 1, the PDF shows the North Carolina seal centered at the top, agency branding text at upper left, and a DEQ logo/footer graphic near the bottom. In the HTML, these graphics are absent and replaced by plain text blocks.

findings.description: Top-of-page layout is simplified and does not preserve the original branded letterhead structure.
findings.evidence: The PDF page 1 has a centered seal/date arrangement and left-aligned executive names in a distinct letterhead layout. The HTML presents these as stacked text with reduced whitespace grouping, altering the visual structure though the main body remains readable.

findings.description: Signature styling is not preserved in the HTML.
findings.evidence: On page 3, the PDF includes a handwritten signature above Michael A. Abraczinskas's printed name and title. The HTML shows only typed text for the closing and name/title, losing the visual signature element.

findings.description: Embedded signature image is missing from the HTML.
findings.evidence: The PDF page 3 contains a blue handwritten signature in the signature block. The HTML omits this image entirely, leaving only text.

findings.description: The HTML fabricates a hyperlink by turning the plain-text email address into a clickable link, even though no hyperlink is present in the PDF.
findings.evidence: PDF page 3 shows plain text: "randy.strait@ncdenr.gov." HTML page 3 contains: "If you should have any questions, please contact Randy Strait of my staff at (919) 707-8721 or randy.strait@ncdenr.gov." rendered as link text/link behavior rather than plain text.

findings.description: The HTML omits the visible DEQ logo text and associated branding text from page 1 footer, reducing text fidelity.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 footer includes visible logo text "DEQ" and accompanying mark at lower left in addition to the footer address block. HTML page 1 replaces the scanned image with an tag and only preserves the address text in a footer block; the visible "DEQ" text/logo wording is not represented as text.
